perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a middle-aged male (Tim) wearing a grey flat cap and glasses, speaking enthusiastically. (2) A quick cut shows him appearing to drop a black object, then a transition to him at a tech launch event standing in front of a red backdrop. (3) He picks up a black magnetic lens accessory from a display stand. (4) He demonstrates attaching the lens to the back of a smartphone, showing the magnetic connection. (5) The camera switches to a POV shot of the smartphone's screen, showing the camera interface while someone walks by in the background. (6) Tim looks back at the camera, smiling and pointing to the device.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Mandarin vocals start immediately, accompanied by a fast-paced, upbeat electronic background track. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect occurs during a visual transition. (3) The vocals continue with a steady, excited tone as the background music maintains its tempo. (4) Subdued ambient crowd noise and chatter are audible in the background of the event space. (5) A final closing statement by the male speaker ends the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '在小米發表會' (At Xiaomi Launch Event) - Functional text setting the scene. (2) '我差點摔壞了鏡頭!!' (I almost broke the lens!!) - Hook text in a variety-show style. (3) '救救...' (Help...) with eye emojis - Decorative/Humorous text. (4) '熱騰騰的' (Fresh/Hot) - Decorative text indicating a new release. (5) '它是磁吸的' (It's magnetic) - Functional technical description. (6) '這是一款可磁吸用於手機背部外掛式的鏡頭相機' (This is a magnetic external lens camera for the back of phones) - Functional subtitle. (7) '無需配對充電 另外連結' (No pairing or charging, separate connection) - Functional product feature text. (8) '能即吸跟即用' (Can be used immediately upon attachment) - Functional product feature text. (9) '那你感興趣嗎?' (Are you interested?) - Hook/Call to Action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Demonstration -> Practical Usage Demo -> Closing Question.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 3 males and 1 female visible in the background at the event.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male wearing a grey patterned flat cap, glasses, a dark blue sweater with a white 'ROOTS' logo, and light blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts with a plain white wall, then shifts to a vibrant red exhibition booth with Xiaomi branding and glass display cases.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright exhibition lighting, consistent and clear.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a quick 'hands-on' review and promotion for a new Xiaomi magnetic smartphone lens accessory. It aims to capture viewer interest through a dramatic 'near-drop' hook, followed by a demonstration of the product's ease of use and immediate functionality in a real-world event setting.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is at an official brand launch event, showcasing the product features in a positive and promotional manner.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's signature flat cap and high-energy Mandarin delivery style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'variety show' editing techniques common in Asian social media to maintain high engagement.
